testcase.name: test_order_mixed_1_mixed_licence_with_product_registered

failure.message:
selenium.common.exceptions.ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element
...
is not clickable at point (1057, 1010). Other element would receive the click:
(Session info: headless chrome=118.0.5993.117); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: #0 0x5620b3714fb3 #1 0x5620b33e84a7 #2 0x5620b3435ecd #3 0x5620b343426d #4 0x5620b3432028 #5 0x5620b3431097 #6 0x5620b3425d59 #7 0x5620b3451942 #8 0x5620b3425776 #9 0x5620b3451b0e #10 0x5620b346ac02 #11 0x5620b3451713 #12 0x5620b342418b #13 0x5620b3424f7e #14 0x5620b36da8d8 #15 0x5620b36de800 #16 0x5620b36e8cfc #17 0x5620b36df418 #18 0x5620b36ac42f #19 0x5620b37034e8 #20 0x5620b37036b4 #21 0x5620b3714143 #22 0x7fe959ba9609 start_thread

testcase.name: test_order_pickup_1_self_pickup_registered

failure.message: selenium.common.exceptions.TimeoutException: Message: Element is not clickable. Element: //div[@data-name='orderShippingPicker']//p[contains(text(), 'Salony')]/ancestor::article

testcase.failure:
